discovery_domain: comparison of global witness-schema synthesis on the exact v44 partition, using conjunction atoms of 1 to 4 versus 1 to 5 signed literals
holdout_domain: the same 13 holdout fact states from v29 to v46
strongest_claim: Allowing conjunction atoms of 1 to 5 signed literals does not improve the main global witness object from v46: the exact partition stays the same, total region cost stays 22, and the best shared global schema count stays 19.
